532: /// If the push remote owner differs from the PR target repo owner,
533: /// returns `push_owner:branch`. Otherwise returns just `branch`.
534: pub fn cross_fork_head(branch: &str, push_remote: &str, pr_repo: Option<&str>) -> String {
535:     let Some(target_repo) = pr_repo else {

541:         branch.to_string()
